venn_field_scene: The image shows a panel of icons and two overlapping marked circles.
The figure shows a panel of icons with two overlapping marked circles.
This image shows icons arranged around two overlapping marked circles.
The scene shows icons and two overlapping marked circles.
The picture shows icons with two overlapping marked circles.

single: The two circles divide the panel into four regions: left circle only, right circle only, the overlap of both circles, and outside both circles. Using icon centers to decide regions, how many {target_description} are in the same region as the marked reference icon?

Treat each icon's center as its Venn-region position. The four regions are left circle only, right circle only, both-circle overlap, and outside both circles. Count the {target_description} in the same region as the marked reference icon.
Using the center of each icon, classify it as left-only, right-only, in both circles, or outside both circles. How many {target_description} share the marked reference icon's region?

The marked reference icon belongs to exactly one of four center-based regions: left circle only, right circle only, overlap of both circles, or outside both circles. How many {target_description} are in that same region?
By icon center, the possible regions are left-only, right-only, both-circle overlap, and outside both circles. Find the number of {target_description} in the marked reference icon's region.
inside_both_circles_count: How many {target_description} have centers inside both marked circles?
Count the {target_description} whose centers are inside both marked circles.
How many {target_description} are centered in the overlap of the two marked circles?
Find the number of {target_description} with centers inside both circles.
How many {target_description} have centers in the shared region of the marked circles?
inside_either_circle_count: How many {target_description} have centers inside at least one marked circle?
Count the {target_description} whose centers are inside either marked circle.
How many {target_description} are centered in one or both of the marked circles?
Find the number of {target_description} with centers inside at least one circle.
How many {target_description} have centers in the union of the two marked circles?
inside_exactly_one_circle_count: How many {target_description} have centers inside exactly one marked circle?
Count the {target_description} whose centers are inside one marked circle but not both.
How many {target_description} are centered in exactly one of the marked circles?
Find the number of {target_description} with centers in only one circle.
How many {target_description} have centers in a non-overlap part of the marked circles?
outside_both_circles_count: How many {target_description} have centers outside both marked circles?
Count the {target_description} whose centers are outside both marked circles.
How many {target_description} are centered outside the two marked circles?
Find the number of {target_description} with centers outside both circles.
How many {target_description} have centers in neither marked circle?
